root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(operate_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as sale_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(operate_date , 'YYYY') as sale_year , sale_amount /*ราคาขาย*/ , remark , bf_value /*ยอดยกมา*/ , buy_in_year /*ลดลง*/ from sc_acc_m_expire_detail where 1=1 and item_type = 'EXS' /*WHERE*/ --and operate_date between '01/1/2019' and '26/9/2023'
